description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a dark, richly grained wooden tabletop supported by sleek, black metal legs in a minimalist frame. The desk features a flat, smooth surface with no visible drawers or storage compartments, emphasizing a clean and functional design. On top of the desk sits a flat-screen computer monitor with a rectangular base, accompanied by a small peripheral device, likely a mouse, placed to the right. The metal legs are open and angular, providing stability while maintaining an airy, contemporary aesthetic. The wood grain pattern is prominent and adds a touch of natural elegance to the otherwise industrial look. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for both professional and home office environments.
description: A modern desk with a dark wood top and black metal legs, featuring a computer monitor and mouse on its surface. The design is minimalist and functional, with a prominent wood grain and no visible storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the desk, the wood grain surface, and the computer monitor with a mouse on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the desk and monitor, with the metal frame visible beneath the tabletop.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the monitor and the continuous wood grain across the desk's surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slimness of the desk and the monitor's stand, with the mouse visible behind the monitor.
attribute_orientation: The side with the computer monitor and mouse is intended to face the user, with the open leg frame providing legroom underneath; the back is plain with no features.
